title: AlphaXP Pro System Fully Operational
summary: The highly anticipated AlphaXP Pro terminal has entered its beta launch phase. All systems, including the newly revamped AlphaXP Genesis module, are functioning perfectly.
content: Following extensive testing and UI refinement, AlphaXP is proud to announce the next phase of its beta program. The robust backend architecture ensures real-time delivery of Alpha AI intelligence and high-frequency market data to members. Early supporters who participate in the Genesis phase will receive priority allocations.

title: Bitcoin Surges Past Institutional Resistance
summary: BTC has broken the $75,000 threshold following massive ETF inflows from major asset managers this week.
content: Institutional adoption of Bitcoin continues to accelerate as BlackRock and Fidelity post record consecutive inflows into their spot ETFs. The market is reacting extremely bullish as supply on exchanges drops to multi-year lows. Alpha AI models suggest the next major resistance lies at the $80,000 psychological level.
